title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
description: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
description: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dressed in a blue suit and white shirt, he was relaxed — even when the conversation turned to the rivals.

title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
description: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational shopping experience for users.

title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
description: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.

title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors
description: ElevenLabs reveals new investors, hits $500M ARR, and expands enterprise footprint as voice AI becomes a critical interface.

title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

title: 4 days left: Get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass to make more deals faster
description: For the next four days only, you can buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. That window closes May 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT. After that, prices go up, and you’ll pay more to bring a partner or colleague. Register today to get your plus-one pass at 50% off.

title: India’s first GenAI unicorn shifts to cloud services as AI model ambitions face reality
description: Krutrim's pivot to cloud after layoffs and limited product updates reflects the economic challenges of building AI models in India.

title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.
